name: input-group
description: Wraps an input or textarea with addons (icons, text, buttons) aligned to either edge, sharing one bordered container. Use for search boxes with an icon, inputs with a unit suffix, or inline actions. Parts: InputGroup (root), InputGroupAddon (align inline-start | inline-end | block-start | block-end), InputGroupButton, InputGroupText, InputGroupInput, InputGroupTextarea.
